_publications._publicationTitle: The German version of the neurofibromatosis 2 impact on quality of life questionnaire correlates with severity of depression and physician-reported disease severity.

_contextSnippet: There was a strong correlation between NFTI-QOL-D and clinician-reported disease severity (Pearson's rho = 0.62, 95% CI 0.42–0.76
details: Strong correlation with clinician-reported disease severity (Pearson's rho = 0.62, 95% CI 0.42–0.76)
